laymans_matrix.What People Complain About: Paying $10,000+ every month to OpenAI because the AI re-reads massive chat history on every single turn.
laymans_matrix.Real-World Analogy: Like paying a taxi driver to drive back to your home city every time you want to go to the next street block.
laymans_matrix.Prexi Layman Solution: Prexi acts as a smart memory filter. It trims out repetitive chat fluff and passes only the exact sentences the AI needs—cutting your bill by 65%+ in 1 second.

laymans_matrix.What People Complain About: AI coding assistants take 5–8 seconds to respond because long system prompts cause prefill lag.
laymans_matrix.Real-World Analogy: Like waiting 5 minutes for a waiter to re-read the entire menu aloud before taking your water order.
laymans_matrix.Prexi Layman Solution: Prexi remembers identical or similar previous questions and returns cached answers instantly with zero delay.

laymans_matrix.What People Complain About: Raw error stack traces and unformatted code logs eat up 80% of the AI prompt window.
laymans_matrix.Real-World Analogy: Like sending an entire 500-page car repair manual when you just need to tell the mechanic 'the tire is flat'.
laymans_matrix.Prexi Layman Solution: Prexi compresses verbose stack traces into clean 2-line summaries while keeping 100% of underlying code logic.

laymans_matrix.What People Complain About: Afraid to summarize sensitive patient/legal data because AI summaries might drop critical details.
laymans_matrix.Real-World Analogy: Like using a shredder on a legal contract—summarizing medical history can be dangerous.
laymans_matrix.Prexi Layman Solution: Protected Zones automatically detect medical or legal text and lock compression OFF, guaranteeing 100% data safety.

laymans_matrix.What People Complain About: Integrating new AI optimization tools requires rewriting hundreds of lines of complex SDK code.
laymans_matrix.Real-World Analogy: Like having to replace your entire car engine just to plug in a phone charger.
laymans_matrix.Prexi Layman Solution: Change just ONE line of code (`baseURL: 'https://api.Prexi.ai/v1'`). Every API call is automatically compressed and cached.
